source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive (Creator Partnerships)
source_jobs.description:
SETTING THE STAGE

Online sports betting content is exploding in popularity. But the experience of engaging with sports betting content is often a needlessly painful one. Most users are long-term losers. There are a select few that are proven winners over the long term. They're expert sports handicappers ("cappers"). They've built audiences on social media, with their fans chasing for an edge across different platforms and tools. The experience of online sports betting is fragmented and often painful. Trust is fragile, workflows are fragmented, and the experience feels more like chaos than community. Cappers and fans alike are looking for better results with less effort.




OUR VISION AND OUR MISSION:

DubClub is building the destination where cappers and fans Win More Together.

 - For fans: DubClub is creating unified and highly valuable experience for fans that love tailing cappers. Get the best advice, in the smoothest fashion, and enjoy rewards that keep you engaged.

 - For cappers: DubClub is a business-building engine that helps you turn your passion into a profitable business. Cappers are the stars of the game, and enjoy a best-in-class operating system, automated marketing, and purpose-built discovery that grows their business on auto-pilot.

 - For DubClub: It’s the ecosystem and unified "Win More Together" experience that cappers and fans have been waiting for. It's the value-add layer that brings richness to the experience of betting, tailing, and discovering new cappers.


THE ROLE

You will be a founding member of the Sales team working to bring new partners (”Cappers”) to the platform. As an early team member, you will be responsible for accelerating DubClub’s revenue by executing our outbound sales motion. You will own the entire sales lifecycle, from lead generation to close.


THE PROBLEMS YOU WILL SOLVE

 - Own the entire process of winning new business for DubClub. You will be responsible for ensuring that DubClub maintains a vibrant funnel of leads, prospects, opportunities, and recently "won" new accounts.

 - Deeply understand partner needs and requirements. Communicate DubClub’s product offerings so partners can understand how their business will grow with DubClub.

 - Develop sales infrastructure. Create and establish foundational sales playbooks and scripts that standardize and elevate our sales efforts, ensuring consistency and scalability in our processes. Leverage AI and CRM tools to drive efficient systems that delight prospects and customers.

 - Collaborate to close deals. Partner with the GTM and Product teams to communicate potential customer needs; bring in partner specialists to a sales deal as needed; set partners up for success.

 - Advocate for product roadmap on behalf of customers. Be an evidence-driven partner advocate based on intel from the industry. Influence product roadmap towards solving pain that will help win more new business, create marketplace stickiness, and lead the DubClub ecosystem into new frontiers solving problems for our partners.




WHAT MAKES A GREAT CANDIDATE

 - You are a ‘strategic-doer.’ You bring a strong work ethic and desire to win to our team. You are an intelligent and relentless problem solver.

 - You care deeply about operational excellence. You have impeccable attention to detail. and elite organizational skills. You have excellent professional hygiene.

 - Decisive and agile. We move fast. We offer support and collaboration but also provide decision-making autonomy. You can make impactful business decisions with little direction.

 - You are highly curious about our problem space. You have passion for our market and an understanding of two-sided marketplace dynamics in the creator economy. Your industry insight will be key in navigating market trends and positioning DubClub as a leader.

 - Partner-centric. You are deeply committed to understanding and advancing the goals of our partners. Your dedication to enhancing partner relationships is matche

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer (Full-Stack)
source_jobs.description:
SETTING THE STAGE

Online sports betting content is exploding in popularity. But the experience of engaging with sports betting content is often a needlessly painful one. Most users are long-term losers. There are a select few that are proven winners over the long term. They're expert sports handicappers ("cappers"). They've built audiences on social media, with their fans chasing for an edge across different platforms and tools. The experience of online sports betting is fragmented and often painful. Trust is fragile, workflows are fragmented, and the experience feels more like chaos than community. Cappers and fans alike are looking for better results with less effort.




OUR VISION AND OUR MISSION:

DubClub is building the destination where cappers and fans Win More Together.

 - For fans: DubClub is creating unified and highly valuable experience for fans that love tailing cappers. Get the best advice, in the smoothest fashion, and enjoy rewards that keep you engaged.

 - For cappers: DubClub is a business-building engine that helps you turn your passion into a profitable business. Cappers are the stars of the game, and enjoy a best-in-class operating system, automated marketing, and purpose-built discovery that grows their business on auto-pilot.

 - For DubClub: It’s the ecosystem and unified "Win More Together" experience that cappers and fans have been waiting for. It's the value-add layer that brings richness to the experience of betting, tailing, and discovering new cappers.


THE ROLE

We’re hiring a Staff Software Engineer to join our Chicago hub. This is a senior IC role for someone who wants to own projects end-to-end and ship directly to millions of passionate users.

You’ll be embedded directly with our founders and GTM leaders to identify opportunities, scope solutions, and deliver features on tight timelines. Your mandate: maximize value creation for users through speed, craft, and deep understanding of our space.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Partner with customer-facing “co-pilots” (founders and GTM leaders) to define roadmap and deliver value for DubClub's users.

 - Lead design and development of full-stack product features in the mobile and web app.

 - Balance speed, scope, and maintainability to deliver near-term immediate impact, while keeping long-term scalability in mind.

 - Provide technical leadership, mentorship, and architectural guidance to other engineers.

 - Collaborate with GTM leaders and design talent to implement intuitive, reliable, and valuable user experiences.


ABOUT YOU




 - Based in, or willing to relocate to, Chicago.

 - 3–6 years of professional software engineering experience, ideally in startups/scaleups.

 - Proven track record of shipping impactful features across the stack.

 - Passionate about technology and adding value for users through elegant, beautiful product. You thrive on building practical solutions that people love to use as part of their everyday routine.

 - You are an unambiguous adopter of agentic coding methodologies. You know that building in an "AI-first" fashion allows you to ship faster, at higher quality.

 - Strong technical judgment: you know when to optimize, when to cut scope, and when to refactor.

 - Excellent communicator and collaborator.

 - Excited about the sports betting space and eager to shape the future of how creators and fans interact.

 - Experience building React Native mobile apps preferred.

 - Bonus: experience building marketplaces, fintech, or consumer-facing products.


OUR STACK

 - Our backend runs on Python (Django) and Go, with PostgreSQL for data storage.

 - The frontend is built with TypeScript and Svelte.

 - Our mobile app is built in ReactNative.

 - We use Docker for containerization, with GitHub Actions for CI/CD and Terraform for infrastructure management.


WHY DUBCLUB

 - A chance to build the future of a culturally important space alongside founders who live and breathe the space.

 - Senior IC seat with ownershi

notes: Small sample size, but tech roles dominate. No explicit sponsorship or clearance info.
